name: MorningAI
description: AI news tracking system. Tracks 76+ AI entities across 9 data sources and generates daily structured reports with optional cover infographics.

plugins.name: ai-tracker
plugins.description: Track 76+ AI entities across X, Reddit, HN, GitHub, HuggingFace, arXiv, YouTube, Discord, and web search. Generates scored, deduplicated daily Markdown reports.
